formulas.name: The Permanent Settlement of 1793
formulas.formula: The British government fixed the land revenue at Rs. 2.5 million annually, which was to be collected from the peasants.
formulas.notes: Introduced by Lord Cornwallis, this settlement was meant to reduce the burden on the peasants.

formulas.name: The Revenue System of the East India Company
formulas.formula: The East India Company's revenue system was based on the 'ryotwari' and 'mahalwari' systems.
formulas.notes: The 'ryotwari' system was based on individual peasant ownership of land, while the 'mahalwari' system was based on collective ownership by communities.

formulas.name: The Zamindari System
formulas.formula: The Zamindari system was a feudal system where the Zamindar (landlord) was responsible for collecting revenue from the peasants.
formulas.notes: This system was prevalent in Bengal and other parts of India during the British period.

formulas.name: The Bengal Regulation of 1793
formulas.formula: The Bengal Regulation of 1793 allowed the Zamindars to collect revenue from the peasants in return for a fixed rent.
formulas.notes: This regulation was introduced by Lord Cornwallis to encourage the Zamindars to invest in land improvement.

formulas.name: The Mahalwari System
formulas.formula: The Mahalwari system was a revenue system where the peasants were grouped into villages and were responsible for paying revenue to the Zamindar.
formulas.notes: This system was prevalent in Uttar Pradesh and other parts of India during the British period.

formulas.name: The Ryotwari System
formulas.formula: The Ryotwari system was a revenue system where the peasants were individual owners of land and were responsible for paying revenue to the Zamindar.
formulas.notes: This system was prevalent in Madras and other parts of India during the British period.

formulas.name: The Permanent Settlement of 1793 (Effects)
formulas.formula: The Permanent Settlement of 1793 led to the concentration of land in the hands of the Zamindars, who exploited the peasants.
formulas.notes: This settlement also led to the decline of the peasants' economic condition.
